label: 掩码差集
description: 对两个网格求差集：网格1中为非零值、且网格2中为零值的点位输出1，其余输出0。尺寸策略：允许两网格尺寸不一，按左下角对齐，输出尺寸与网格1相同，网格2未覆盖的区域视为0（与「掩码交集」mask_intersect 不同，后者要求尺寸完全相同否则报错）。
description-en: Computes the difference of two grids: outputs 1 where grid1 is non-zero and grid2 is zero, and 0 elsewhere. Size policy: differing sizes are tolerated by aligning the grids at their bottom-left corners; output size matches grid1, and areas grid2 does not cover are treated as 0 (unlike Intersect (mask_intersect), which requires identical sizes and otherwise errors).
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。两个圆形色块，左圆蓝色，右圆绿色，交叠区域被裁去（变为深灰镂空），左圆剩余部分高亮蓝色，背景浅灰，突出差集概念。主色3种，简洁现代。

inputs.name: inputGrid1
inputs.label: 网格1（被减）
inputs.description: 被减网格，非零值视为有效区域
inputs.description-en: The minuend grid; non-zero values are treated as valid regions.

inputs.name: inputGrid2
inputs.label: 网格2（减数）
inputs.description: 减数网格，非零值视为需要排除的区域；与网格1按 lacing 逐分支配对
inputs.description-en: The subtrahend grid; non-zero values indicate regions to exclude. Paired branch-by-branch with grid1 via lacing.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 差集网格
outputs.description: 网格1 减去 网格2 的结果，输出尺寸与网格1相同
outputs.description-en: grid1 minus grid2; output size matches grid1.
